use_cases: Display content in a contained card layout with consistent styling
Create interactive hover effects with lift and shadow animation
Build card-based layouts and grids for content organization
Present hierarchical content with headers, titles, descriptions, and footers
Use as a base component for more specialized card variants
ai_summary: A reusable card component system with hover animations built using Framer Motion. The card lifts 5 pixels on hover with a smooth shadow transition, creating an interactive feel. Includes sub-components for CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter for structured content layout. Designed as a foundational UI component suitable for various applications and industries.
